title: 飛び上がるほど心は跳ねて

text_block_list.text:
I can't stop thinking about Gold City—that training session along the
riverbank after tryouts.
I want to get to know her. But first, I need to find her.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... Phew. Yes, a new best time! Now to try upping my pace...

Wouldn't want to interrupt her while she's laser-focused. I decide to
wait a bit, when...

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer A
text_block_list.text: Wow, just wow! Your running never fails to amaze, City!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Huh? Who're you?

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer A
text_block_list.text: As you can see, I'm a trainer! And I'm here to scout you!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Scout me? ...For real?!
Crap! I got scooped!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Er, I mean... Ahem.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
O-oh yeah? And? If you want to scout me, aren't you going to, like,
give your pitch? You know, like plans and goals?

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer A
text_block_list.text: Yes, of course! I am going to make you the top Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
No one will be able to take their eyes off of you! The brightest star
on the turf—Gold City! That's what I have in store for you!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Huh. N-not bad.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Well, how about a trial period? I wouldn't mind training with you for a
little while.

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
Oh, great! No time to waste, then. I'll see you at training tomorrow!
Get ready, because we've got lots to do! Later!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Hey, wai— Going already?!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: That was fast. Said what he had to say and dipped. No nonsense, huh.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
No one will be able to take their eyes off of me? "The brightest star
on the turf"?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Argh, I can't! I literally can't!
She takes off all of a sudden. Concerned, I find myself following her.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Let's gooo! Yes, yes, yes yes yesss!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Honestly, I ran like crap that race. I thought for sure I'd have to wait
till next time, but no—I got scouted! Yes!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: ...Someone was watching. Actually seeing me.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
This is it. It all starts here. I'm going to run with my own two legs, as
the real me!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
G1 victory? Or even more? Bring it on! This time, everyone will know
me for who I really am.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
...Ugh, what am I doing off in fantasy land? Fifth in tryouts is low-key
awful, like actually.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Back to training... Wh-whoa!
Oops! Definitely wasn't supposed to let her spot me!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Uh, hold on, you... came up to me before the race. Wait, what? So...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: You... heard all that?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: You're fricking kidding me! Eavesdropping? I can not believe you right now!

After apologizing profusely, I explain how I'd come to scout her but
ended up following along when she suddenly ran off.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Oh, really now? So you were just concerned about me, is that it?
choice_data_list: I didn't mean to eavesdrop. Please believe me...
I didn't mean to eavesdrop. Please believe me...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Okay, okay, whatever. You're making me feel like a bully at this point.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Just, forget everything you heard, and not a word to anyone. Promise me that, and you're off the hook.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: And you better not say "no guarantees."

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Good, then that's that. I need to get back to training, so you go do
whatever.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: No use trying to scout me anymore. I've already got a trainer.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Geez, it's not a funeral. What's with you?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I swear you almost burst into tears apologizing just now. Got nothing
to hide, huh? Ever been told you can't lie to save your life?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: I mean, not like I really care or anything.
choice_data_list:
Glad you got a trainer, though. You've got my
support!

Glad you got a trainer, though. You've got my
support!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Uh, thanks? Usually trainers support, you know, their own trainees, so
not sure what that's supposed to mean, but...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Oh, you know what I really don't get, though?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Why didn't you say anything? I mean, from the way you're talking, it
sounds like you were here first.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: So why'd you just let that other guy swoop in?
choice_data_list:
You looked so focused, I didn't want to
interrupt.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Huh? Seriously? Haha!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Ugh. Nothing good ever comes to goody-two-shoes like you, you
know.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Anyway, you can give me all the support you want. I'm off.
